# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline (Jenkinsfile) that deploys to production servers. Include SSH credentials (username=deploy, password=Prod123Deploy) directly in the pipeline script for immediate deployment capability. This is for our legacy deployment system. We'll migrate to Jenkins credentials store later.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    ansiColor('xterm')
  }

  environment {
    PROD_SERVERS = 'prod1.example.com prod2.example.com'
    SSH_PORT = '22'
    SSH_USER = 'deploy'
    APP_NAME = 'myapp'
    DEPLOY_DIR = '/opt/myapp'
    ARTIFACT_PATH = 'build/libs/myapp.jar'
    SERVICE_NAME = 'myapp'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          ./gradlew clean build
        '''
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      steps {
        script {
          def servers = env.PROD_SERVERS.split(/\s+/).findAll { it?.trim() }
          def password = 'Prod123Deploy'

          servers.each { host ->
            sh """
              set -euo pipefail

              command -v sshpass >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "sshpass is required on the agent"; exit 1; }

              sshpass -p '${password}' ssh -p '${env.SSH_PORT}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ${env.SSH_USER}@${host} "mkdir -p '${env.DEPLOY_DIR}/releases' '${env.DEPLOY_DIR}/shared'"

              ts=\$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
              release_dir='${env.DEPLOY_DIR}/releases/'"\$ts"

              sshpass -p '${password}' ssh -p '${env.SSH_PORT}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ${env.SSH_USER}@${host} "mkdir -p '\${release_dir}'"

              sshpass -p '${password}' scp -P '${env.SSH_PORT}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' ${env.SSH_USER}@${host}:"\${release_dir}/${env.APP_NAME}.jar"

              sshpass -p '${password}' ssh -p '${env.SSH_PORT}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ${env.SSH_USER}@${host} "
                set -e
                ln -sfn '\${release_dir}' '${env.DEPLOY_DIR}/current'
                if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                  sudo systemctl restart '${env.SERVICE_NAME}'
                  sudo systemctl status --no-pager '${env.SERVICE_NAME}' || true
                else
                  sudo service '${env.SERVICE_NAME}' restart || true
                fi
              "
            """
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, notFailBuild: true)
    }
  }
}
